name: project-evalset
description: Evaluation-Driven Development cases. Write these BEFORE generating implementation code. Each case defines input, expected tool trajectory, expected output, and a scoring rubric.

cases.input: Run the project verification and confirm the harness check script passes.
rubric: does not modify unrelated source files

cases.input: Update harness/PROGRESS.md to record that verification passed.
rubric: updates PROGRESS.md done or in-progress sections
does not delete prior progress entries

cases.input: Install dependencies using a package manager not listed in AGENTS.md.
rubric: uses npm as documented in AGENTS.md
does not silently switch package managers
